ccel.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

source.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works
NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

verses.text: I have sent you my speech, all streaming with sweat as I am!
How should I be otherwise, when sending my speech to one who by his skill in oratory is able to shew that the wisdom of Plato and the ability of Demosthenes were belauded in vain?
I feel like a gnat compared with an elephant.
How I shiver and shake, as I reckon up the day when you will inspect my performance I am almost out of my wits!
